questions.question: What is the primary difference between a decision tree and a flowchart, and how does this impact the complexity of solving problems using these methods?
Explain the concept of NP-completeness and provide an example of an NP-complete problem. Be sure to discuss why this problem is considered to be hard to solve exactly.
A problem is in NP if it can be verified in linear time. Is it necessarily true that a problem is NP-complete if it is NP-hard? Provide a counterexample to support your answer.
